subcodes.first_line: O God! O God! I supplicate toward Thee with a heart overflowing with Thy love. I call on Thee, O Lord, in the middle of nights
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی اتضرع الیک بقلب خافق بمحبتک و ادعوک فی جنج اللیالی یا الهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for gatherings; meetings; assemblies, @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity
